title: Create response echoes unstripped title/author
evidence: app.py:85 returns raw `title`/`author` while app.py:80 persists `str(title).strip()`, so the 201 body can differ from the stored/GET value when input has surrounding whitespace
suggestion: Return the stripped values (or the row just inserted) so POST and subsequent GET agree

title: init_db only runs under __main__
evidence: app.py:167-169 calls init_db() inside `if __name__ == "__main__"`; under a WSGI server (gunicorn/uwsgi) the books table is never created and first request would fail
suggestion: Initialize the schema at import/app-factory time, not only in the dev-server entrypoint

title: Empty JSON body reports misleading error message
evidence: app.py:56-58 treats a falsy parsed body (e.g. `{}`) as 'Request body must be JSON' rather than a missing-fields error; test_create_book_no_body (test_app.py:104) posts `{}` and only asserts 400
suggestion: Distinguish 'no/invalid JSON' from 'valid JSON missing required fields'

title: 16 tests cover all endpoints incl. validation, 404, and filtering
evidence: test_app.py defines 16 tests across 6 endpoint classes; 0 skips; scores.json test_coverage=0.97, defect_rate=1.0 (build+tests passed)
suggestion: None — noted as a strength beyond the >=3 test requirement (R12)
